name: claude-usage-tracker
description: Track your Claude Code token usage and cost

enumDescriptions: Pay-per-token via API key — shows estimated USD cost
Claude Pro subscription ($20/mo) — shows token usage only, no cost estimates
Claude Max subscription ($100/mo) — shows token usage only, no cost estimates
claudeUsage.billingMode.description: Your Claude billing mode. Use 'pro' or 'max' if you are on a subscription plan rather than paying per token.
